commit_note: Final remediation commit SHA is reported in the handoff JSON.

requirement_results.summary: Renderer contract exposes typed readPending() backed by governance_pending and returning pendingCount.
Renderer contract exposes readAccess() and derives hasAdminWrite/isReadOnly from governance_status_read authorities.

requirement_results.verify: cargo test -p gitbutler-tauri --test mgmt_ipc_003_governance_commands --test mgmt_ipc_005_governance_pending --test tt_022_governance_commit
requirement_results.summary: Renderer contract exposes commitPending(); backend governance_commit creates a real target-ref commit with message chore: update governance config.
No renderer direct governance TOML write path introduced; raw grep count is zero. On this BSD wc host the raw output is padded.

requirement_results.verify: pnpm --dir apps/desktop exec vitest run --mode development src/lib/governance/governanceService.test.ts
requirement_results.summary: Vitest proves pendingCount and hasAdminWrite are available through the typed renderer service without production stubs.

requirement_results.verify: cargo test -p gitbutler-tauri --test tt_022_governance_commit governance_commit_commits_only_pending_governance_files && pnpm --dir apps/desktop exec vitest run --mode development src/lib/governance/governanceService.test.ts
requirement_results.summary: Rust IPC test proves commit action reaches a real Tauri command and commits only governance config files; Vitest proves renderer calls governance_commit.

red_evidence.summary: Failed before implementation because Command governance_commit was not found.

green_evidence.verify: cargo test -p gitbutler-tauri --test mgmt_ipc_003_governance_commands --test mgmt_ipc_005_governance_pending --test tt_022_governance_commit
pnpm --dir apps/desktop exec vitest run --mode development src/lib/governance/governanceService.test.ts

dependency_notes: crates/gitbutler-tauri/Cargo.toml and Cargo.lock add gitbutler-reference and gitbutler-repo because the real governance_commit command updates the target ref through gitbutler_repo::commit_with_signature_gix and needs gitbutler_reference::Refname for the existing commit API.
The implementation validates and loads real worktree governance config before committing, then writes only changed governance config blobs into a new commit on the target ref.
pnpm install --frozen-lockfile was required because this fresh sprint worktree had no node_modules.
pnpm -F @gitbutler/shared package and pnpm -F @gitbutler/ui package were required before desktop check because those workspace packages export dist files.

A broad pnpm -F @gitbutler/desktop test -- src/lib/governance/governanceService.test.ts run executed unrelated desktop tests and failed on pre-existing workspace package resolution before package dist builds; the direct focused Vitest command passed.
